ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  DCM Shriram Industries Ltd. announced its 35th Annual General Meeting for July 15, 2026, where a dividend of Re. 0.40 per share for FY 2025-26 will be proposed alongside director re-appointments and a new COO. A notable operational concern is the substantial past and impending transfers of unclaimed dividends and over 1.3 lakh equity shares to the IEPF, indicating a potentially disengaged segment of the shareholder base and emphasizing the company's push for dematerialization and updated KYC details.
